title: IPE Amendment / Goal Change
desc: You want to change your training goal, but your VRC refuses to update the plan.

fields.name: changeReason
fields.label: Reason for the change (e.g. condition worsened)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Physical standing requirements aggravate back condition

errors: Arbitrarily denying plan changes when medical condition or limitations have changed.
Refusing to issue a written decision notice when IPE amendment request is denied.

evidenceChecklist.text: Doctor statement verifying current plan goal is medically unsuitable
Labor market data showing target field has demand and offers suitable employment
Transcripts showing good academic standing in prerequisite/related courses

bestNextActionRules.action: Submit IPE Amendment Request citing medical necessity under 38 C.F.R. § 21.94.

reviewLaneQuestions.question: Does your current approved vocational goal aggravate your disability?
Have you completed prerequisites or introductory classes for the new goal?
